title: Hyundai Petrol Backpack Leaf Blower, 170mph, 52cc 2 Stroke Engine With Support Harnesses, Anti-vibration, 55 Mins Per Litre Of Fuel
features: Hyundai Petrol Leaf Blower: A powerful and robust high-performance petrol backpack leaf blower from Hyundai, ideal for the most demanding tasks in medium to large gardens, sports clubs, amenity areas, caravan and car parking sites, as well as on driveways and patios.
Powerful Performance: The HYB5200's powerful 52cc 2-stroke air-cooled engine with EURO 5 engine certification lowers fuel consumption as well as emissions whilst maintaining a powerful performance.

Variable Speed Garden Blower: Able to produce airspeeds up to a huge 170mph, this petrol garden blower also features variable airspeed; the easy-to-reach engine speed switch allows you to easily control the airspeed to use lower speeds on delicate areas

Backpack Leaf Blower: Weighing just 9.85kg, the HYB5200's well-balanced backpack design and double shoulder support harnesses is comfortable to wear whilst completing garden clearance work, even during extensive use.
Easy to use with lightweight anti-vibration backpack design: Comfortable to use for prolonged periods with a lockable throttle lever for added ease over continuous use
description: Product Description Petrol Backpack Leaf Blower HYB5200 The HYB5200 is a powerful and robust high-performance petrol backpack leaf blower from Hyundai, ideal for the most demanding tasks in medium to large gardens, sports clubs, amenity areas, caravan and car parking sites, as well as on driveways and patios. Petrol Backpack Leaf Blower Variable Speed Garden Blower Able to produce airspeeds up to a huge 170mph, this petrol garden blower also features variable airspeed; the easy-to-reach engine speed switch allows you to easily control the airspeed to use lower speeds on delicate areas such as flower borders and higher speeds on larger areas for fast clearance. Anti-Vibration Technology Packed with the latest Hyundai technology at a great value price, the HYB5200 is ergonomically designed and fitted with anti-vibration technology. Lightweight Weighing just 9.85kg, the HYB5200's well-balanced backpack design and double shoulder support harnesses is comfortable to wear. Variable Speed Garden Blower Able to produce airspeeds up to a huge 170mph, this petrol garden blower also features variable airspeed. Powerful 52cc 2-Stroke The HYB5200's powerful 52cc 2-stroke air-cooled engine with EURO 5 engine certification lowers fuel consumption as well as emissions. Previous page Backpack Leaf blower Blow away leaves with ease! The HYB5200 is designed for comfort and efficiency in mind. Comfort Straps Comfort Straps The HYB5200's comfort straps help to eliminate the feeling of weight whilst using the leaf blower. Easy Controls Easy-to-Reach trigger The easy-to-reach fingertip controls allow you to clear debris effortlessly. Powered by Hyundai A more reliable engine. The HYB5200's powerful 52cc 2-stroke air-cooled engine lowers fuel consumption and emissions.
